title: Agentic AI Infrastructure Best Practice
summary: Explains best-in-class agentic AI infrastructure as the control plane for routing, retrieval, runtime safety, governance, and observability.
claims: Agentic AI infrastructure is the control plane that makes orchestration safe, observable, and scalable.
The core layers are model routing, retrieval and data, runtime workflow, trust and governance, and observability and operations.
Without strong infrastructure, agentic AI remains brittle, hard to trust, and difficult to operate at enterprise scale.
proof_points: The structure matches Joz's existing focus on ACL-aware retrieval, verification, observability, and governance.
It extends the current technical-stack record from tools into operating reliability and control.
It gives a recruiter-safe but technically credible explanation of infrastructure beyond buzzwords.
